name: Sesame Broccoli Stir-Fry with Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons dry white wine or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles to desired doneness as directed on package.
2. Meanwhile, in a large skillet or wok, cook and stir sesame seed over medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from skillet; set aside.
3. In the same skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat until hot. Add garlic; cook and stir 30 seconds. Add broccoli, water chestnuts, and mushrooms; cook and stir 6-7 minutes or until broccoli is crisp-tender.
4. Drain noodles; set aside.
5. In a small bowl, combine broth, wine, soy sauce, and cornstarch; blend well. Add noodles and cornstarch mixture to skillet; cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Sprinkle with sesame seed. Makes 4 servings.
